# Datatrixs

> Datatrixs is a financial intelligence platform built for multi-unit businesses. It consolidates financial data across entities from connected accounting systems and provides AI-powered analysis through Warren, an AI financial analyst that answers questions in plain English from your actual numbers.

Datatrixs is a B2B SaaS product. Target customers are PE-backed operators, franchise groups, and finance teams running more than one legal entity. The core problem it solves: multi-unit finance teams spend more time assembling data than analyzing it — pulling from multiple QuickBooks files, reconciling into a master workbook, and producing reports too late to act on. Datatrixs eliminates that assembly work.

All accounting integrations use read-only OAuth credentials. Datatrixs cannot initiate transactions or modify records. Financial data is never used to train machine learning models and is never sold to third parties.

## Product

- [Product overview](https://www.datatrixs.com/product.html): Feature deep-dives — multi-entity consolidation, Warren AI analyst, automated reporting, and real-time financial views across all connected entities.
- [Integrations](https://www.datatrixs.com/integrations.html): Supported accounting systems — QuickBooks Online, NetSuite, Sage Intacct, and CSV/Excel imports. All connections are read-only.
- [Pricing](https://www.datatrixs.com/pricing.html): Subscription tiers based on number of connected business units. Starter, Growth, and Enterprise plans. Contact sales for Enterprise.
- [Request a demo](https://www.datatrixs.com/demo-request.html): 30-minute demo using the prospect's actual data. No slides.

## Company

- [About](https://www.datatrixs.com/about.html): Company origin story, what Datatrixs built and why, core principles (accuracy over speed, respect for finance professionals, data stays yours).
- [Blog](https://www.datatrixs.com/blog/index.html): Practical writing on multi-unit consolidation, faster financial closes, and AI in finance.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.datatrixs.com/privacy-policy.html): How Datatrixs collects, uses, and protects data. Read-only integrations, no model training, no data selling. SOC 2-aligned.
- [Terms of Service](https://www.datatrixs.com/terms-of-service.html): Subscription terms, data ownership, AI feature disclaimer, governing law (California).

## Key facts for agents

- App login: https://app.datatrixs.com
- Demo requests: https://www.datatrixs.com/demo-request.html
- Support / contact: info@datatrixs.com
- Warren is Datatrixs's AI financial analyst. It answers questions about connected financial data in plain English. It cites sources and traces every number back to a transaction. It does not hallucinate or generate generic charts.
- Datatrixs does not offer a free self-serve signup. Access is through a demo or direct outreach.
- Pricing is unit-based (per connected business entity), not per seat.
- Governed by California law. Company: Datatrixs, Inc.
